title: Former LVMH Chair Brown Discusses K-Shaped Recovery Within Luxury Sector
title_cn: LVMH 前主席布朗讨论奢侈品行业的 K 型复苏

She highlighted that even among luxury brands, performance is diverging significantly. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

(Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zscaler CEO: Anthropic's Mythos Has Added 'Fuel to the Fire'
title_cn: Zscaler首席执行官：Anthropic的神话“火上浇油”
summary: Zscaler CEO Jay Chaudry expects says the company's track record is 'very good' when it comes to revenue, and that Anthropic's Mythos has added 'fuel to the fire' on cybersecurity.. The security software company gave a fourth-quarter revenue forecast earlier this week that was weaker than expected. Evercore downgrades the stock, noting slowing net new customers.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Rise as Optimism for US-Iran Deal Trims Oil Prices
title_cn: 美伊协议乐观情绪压低油价，国债上涨
summary: Treasuries rose after reports that the US and Iran reached an agreement to extend a truce and work toward ending a three-month war that’s ignited an oil-driven surge in inflation.

title: Gold Rises as Reports of US-Iran Deal Eases Bets on Higher Rates
title_cn: 美伊协议的报道缓解了对加息的押注，金价上涨

title_cn: 交易商评估美伊停战报告，油价稳定
summary: Oil prices were little changed after a volatile trading day as traders digested news that the US and Iran have reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward a pact to end the war.

Today's guests: Strategas ETF Strategist Todd Sohn, TMX VettaFi Head of Sector & Industry Research Roxanna Islam, AdvisorShares CIO & Portfolio Manager Dan Ahrens, and PIMCO Head of Leveraged Finance David Forgash. title: Bessent Says Trump Won’t Accept a Bad Deal on Iran: Full Briefing
title_cn: 贝森特表示特朗普不会接受一项糟糕的伊朗协议：完整简报
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said that President Trump will not make a bad deal with Iran amid reports of a 60-day truce extension waiting the president's approval. Bessent, speaking at the White House press briefing, outlined President Trump's conditions for a deal with Iran, saying that for a deal to happen the country must agree to open the Strait of Hormuz, turn over its enriched uranium and not to pursue a nuclear weapon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Very Bifurcated Market in High Yield: Pimco's Forgash

title: Index Rule Changes for SpaceX IPO 'Odd': Todd Sohn
title_cn: 托德·索恩 (Todd Sohn) 表示 SpaceX IPO 的指数规则变化“奇怪”
summary: Todd Sohn, ETF strategist at Strategas, joins Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." Nasdaq instituted a rule change that shortens the time for newly public companies to be added to its index, while S&P Dow Jones and FTSE Russell are considering similar changes. This comes ahead of expected mega IPOs from SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic.  (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Jefferies Financial Group Inc. has been hit with an investor class action lawsuit over bond purchases made by its 352 Capital fund in a water vending machine firm that federal prosecutors have called a scam.

title: Union Pacific, Norfolk Tumble as Regulator Pauses Merger Review
title_cn: 监管机构暂停合并审查，联合太平洋公司和诺福克公司惨遭失败
summary: Shares of Union Pacific Corp. and Norfolk Southern Corp. slumped the most in more than a year after a key regulator paused its review of their planned $72 billion merger, potentially delaying what would be the biggest rail deal ever.

title: Dell Boosts Outlook to $60B in AI Server Sales This Year
title_cn: 戴尔今年 AI 服务器销售额展望提升至 60B 美元
summary:
Bloomberg News reporter Brody Ford says Dell's server business is helping the company's revenue benefit from the AI boom. 
Dell gave an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed analysts’ estimates, fueled by demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work.
Revenue in the fiscal year ending in January 2027 will be about $167 billion, including $60 billion from the sale of AI servers, the Texas-based company said Thursday in a statement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dell Soars on Raised Outlook for $60 Billion in AI Server Sales
title_cn: 戴尔人工智能服务器销售额展望上调至 600 亿美元，股价飙升
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. shares gained more than 25% in extended trading after the hardware maker gave an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed analysts’ estimates, fueled by demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work.

title_cn: 耗资十亿美元打造自我改进的人工智能
summary: A growing number of AI companies are focusing on an unproven approach called recursive self-improvement.

title: Why The SpaceX IPO Is Unlike Any Other
title_cn: 为什么 SpaceX 的 IPO 与众不同
summary: What began as a rocket startup is now a big bet on satellites, AI and Mars. With a projected valuation near $2 trillion, SpaceX’s IPO could reshape markets. But is Wall Street rushing in too fast? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Currencies Rally for Seventh Day on US-Iran Pact Report

summary: Emerging-market currencies advanced on Thursday — extending a winning streak to a seventh consecutive session — as the US and and Iran near an accord to end the war.

title: Moving Plastic Production Beyond Oil
title_cn: 让塑料生产超越石油
summary:
Albert Douer, UBQ Chairman and CEO says his dream is for more countries to adopt his technology so trash becomes seen as something with value and plastic production can rely less on oil.  
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: Autodesk将以约36亿美元现金收购MaintainX
summary: Engineering software maker Autodesk Inc. has agreed to buy MaintainX, a firm focused on maintenance tools.

summary: Nextpower Inc. agreed to buy battery company Prevalon Energy for as much as $365 million, marking the solar-tracking provider’s move into energy storage and the fast-growing AI data-center market.

title: The Battle Is On to Win Attention and Money as Linear TV Declines

summary: With traditional TV audiences diminishing, everyone from Piers Morgan to OpenAI is trying to capitalize on the moment

summary: Revolut, Nubank and Wise are among the overseas firms competing for consumers’ dollars in the world’s biggest market.

summary: BNY CEO Robin Vince talks about the history of their business, how they use artificial intelligence, and how the technology is impacting jobs. He speaks on Bloomberg Surveillance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Raises $65 Billion in Funding Round, Eclipses OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 在一轮融资中筹集了 650 亿美元，让 OpenAI 黯然失色
summary: Anthropic PBC raised $65 billion in a funding round that valued the artificial intelligence company at $965 billion including the new investment, eclipsing rival OpenAI’s value for the first time. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Valued at $965 Billion After Latest Funding Round, Eclipsing OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 最新一轮融资后估值达 9650 亿美元，超越 OpenAI
summary: Anthropic PBC raised $65 billion in a funding round that valued the artificial intelligence company at $965 billion including the new investment, eclipsing rival OpenAI’s value for the first time.

title: Jana Pushes Fintech Alkami to Reboot Sales Process
title_cn: Jana 推动 Fintech Alkami 重启销售流程
summary: Jana Partners is pushing Alkami Technology Inc. to restart a sales process, according to a person familiar with the matter, after the financial technology company tapped advisers to explore strategic options several months ago.

title: Salesforce Is Facing a True Test, Ives Says
title_cn: 艾夫斯表示 Salesforce 正面临真正的考验
summary: Dan Ives of Wedbush Securities talks about the AI space, earnings from Salesforce and Snowflake and if Tesla and SpaceX should merge. He speaks on Bloomberg Surveillance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Investors Back Brazil’s Pax in Bet on AI-Powered Policing
title_cn: 美国投资者支持巴西的 Pax 押注人工智能驱动的警务
summary: A Brazilian artificial intelligence startup that helps police investigate violent crime is planning a rapid expansion at home, betting its technology is ready for wider use as Brazil confronts mounting public security concerns.

title: Tough World for Crypto ETFs: Roxanna Islam
title_cn: 加密 ETF 的艰难世界：Roxanna Islam
summary: Roxanna Islam, head of sector & industry research at TMX VettaFi, joins Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." Bitcoin briefly fell below $73,000 on Thursday despite a fresh push from President Trump for the CLARITY Act, suggesting pro-crypto messaging from  Washington is losing its ability to drive gains in digital assets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Inference Demand Won't Stop Anytime Soon, Says Benchmark's Vishria
title_cn: Benchmark 的 Vishria 表示，人工智能推理需求不会很快停止
summary: Eric Vishria, partner at Benchmark, joins to discuss the high demand for fast AI inference and to give his outlook for the physical AI space as companies navigate constrains around compute, from memory and power to chip bottlenecks. He joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic’s Growing Trust Problem
title_cn: Anthropic 日益严重的信任问题
summary: Anthropic is trying to build the world’s most powerful AI while convincing governments and customers it can be trusted, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist Parmy Olson. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Boston Seizes on California Billionaire Tax to Lure AI Jobs
title_cn: 波士顿利用加州亿万富翁税来吸引人工智能工作
summary: The talent at some of America’s hottest artificial intelligence companies often passes through Boston-area universities before heading west to build billion-dollar businesses in Silicon Valley. Massachusetts business and political leaders say California’s proposed tax on billionaires is an opportunity to change that.

title: Anthropic Candidates Pay $4,600 for Coaching to Get Hot Jobs
title_cn: 人类候选人支付 4,600 美元获得热门工作的辅导
summary: Landing a job at Anthropic is so competitive that applicants are spending $4,600 on private interview coaching. Candidates say the startup's intense culture screen feels less like an interview and more like therapy. While the company faces incredible pressure to survive economically while keeping its values, people are clamoring to get in. Bloomberg's Jo Constanz joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Snowflake Jumps Most Since 2020 After Amazon Deal | Bloomberg Tech 5/28/2026
title_cn: 亚马逊交易后雪花股价自 2020 年以来涨幅最大 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 28 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down Snowflake's share moves after the software maker gave a strong outlook and signed a $6 billion deal with Amazon. Plus, Bloomberg News pulls back the curtains on Apple's revamped Siri design ahead of its WWDC debut. And, Meta introduces paid chatbot subscriptions to help offset its AI infrastructure costs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Maritime Tech Company Navier's First Major Commercial Rollout
title_cn: 海事科技公司 Navier 的首次重大商业部署
summary: US-based maritime technology company Navier is deploying 100 electric vessels across the Maldives to build an inter-island transportation network linking airports, resorts, and local communities. The rollout marks a major milestone for electrified marine mobility. Navier CEO Sampriti Bhattacharyya joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Plans Wide Release of Mythos-Level AI Models in Weeks
title_cn: Anthropic 计划在几周内广泛发布神话级人工智能模型
summary: Anthropic PBC plans to widely release new artificial intelligence models in the coming weeks with cybersecurity capabilities comparable to Mythos, a technology the company previously said was too dangerous to make available to the general public.

title: Why Prediction Markets Are a New Frontier for Insider Trading
title_cn: 为什么预测市场是内幕交易的新领域
summary: Prediction markets, where users can place bets on real-world outcomes in anything from sports and award shows to elections, interest rate decisions, and even military operations, have become a multi-billion-dollar industry in just a few years. Along the way, they have also become the focus of growing concern that some participants are using privileged information to profit.

title: BYD Debuts China’s Most Advanced EV Chip in Smart-Driving Push
title_cn: 比亚迪首发国内最先进电动汽车芯片 发力智能驾驶
summary: BYD Co., the world’s largest electric vehicle maker, unveiled a series of technology advances, including what it calls China’s first automotive-grade 4-nanometer chip for self-driving cars.

title: EU Says It Needs €120 Billion to Revive Local Chip Production
title_cn: 欧盟表示需要 1200 亿欧元重振本地芯片生产
summary: The European Union is making a fresh attempt to revive its faltering semiconductor industry via a rebooted Chips Act, an effort expected to require €120 billion ($140 billion) in public-private investment by 2035, according to draft plans seen by Bloomberg News.

title: EU Braces for Talks With Anthropic on Access to Mythos AI Model
title_cn: 欧盟准备与 Anthropic 就 Mythos 人工智能模型的使用进行谈判
summary: European Commission officials are planning to meet with Anthropic PBC to seek more information on the company’s Mythos model and request making the groundbreaking artificial intelligence tool available to the bloc, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Bessent Briefs Press, Outlines Trump’s Conditions for Iran | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/28/2026
title_cn: Bessent 向媒体简报，概述了特朗普对伊朗的条件彭博商业周刊日报 5/28/2026
summary: On this episode of Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Alexis Christoforous and Matt Miller speak with Jordan Fabian on the latest from Washington DC ahead of Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent's press briefing. They also spoke with Bloomberg News US Treasury Reporter, Dan Flatley on the latest developments from the briefing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ship-Tracking Data Reveal Hidden Risk of China-Vietnam Showdown
title_cn: 船舶追踪数据揭示中越摊牌隐藏风险
summary: A flurry of Vietnamese island fortifications and intensifying Chinese activity show the rising odds of confrontation in the South China Sea.

title: Trump’s Bid for Federal Employee NDAs Comes With a Long History
title_cn: 特朗普对联邦雇员保密协议的竞标由来已久
summary: The president pursued nondisclosure agreements in his business, TV careers before getting elected.

title: Burnham Vows Tougher Stance on Big Tech, AI If He Becomes UK’s Next Prime Minister
title_cn: 伯纳姆誓言如果他成为英国下一任首相，将对大型科技和人工智能采取更强硬的立场
summary: Andy Burnham, who is seeking to become the UK prime minister this summer, said a government led by him would increase regulations on technology companies and intervene more widely in the economy.

title: Fed's Musalem Says He Expects Warsh Will Consult, Try and Steer FOMC
title_cn: 美联储穆萨勒姆表示，他预计沃什将咨询、尝试并指导联邦公开市场委员会
summary:
Fed's Musalem Says He Expects Warsh Will Consult, Try and Steer FOMC 
Alberto Musalem, St. Louis Federal Reserve president, said he expects new Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh to consult with the full Federal Open Market Committee and then steer members to fulfill the Fed's dual mandate. 
Musalem, speaking to Stephanie Flanders at the Reykjavik economic conference, also said that while he is an AI optimist, it is a 'risky proposition' to rely on the possibility of productivity gains from AI to reduce inflation.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Unlikely to Cede Leverage Over Hormuz, Says Clayton Seigle
title_cn: 克莱顿·西格尔表示，伊朗不太可能放弃对霍尔木兹海峡的影响力
summary: Clayton Seigle, senior fellow at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, said that now that Iran has seen the extent of the leverage the Strait of Hormuz holds over the oil market and the global economy, Tehran is unlikely to cede the new authority even if the US and Iran are able to reach a deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Truce Awaits Trump Signoff | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/28/2026
title_cn: 美国与伊朗休战等待特朗普签署权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 28 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss peace talks between the US and Iran. On today's show, Bluestack Strategies Founder Maura Gillespie, Rebelle Communications Founder Laura Fink, St. Louis Fed President Alberto Musalem, Democratic Congressman Mark Pocan of Wisconsin and Center for Strategic and International Studies Senior Fellow Clayton Seigle. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Postal Service Pauses Discretionary Spending to Preserve Cash
title_cn: 美国邮政服务暂停可自由支配的支出以保存现金
summary: The United States Postal Service is suspending discretionary spending across the organization as it faces a looming liquidity crisis.

title: Bessent Defends Proposal for Trump’s Face on Special $250 Bill
title_cn: Bessent 为 250 美元特别钞票上特朗普头像的提议辩护
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent defended the idea of putting President Donald Trump’s face on a specially issued $250 bill, a move that is currently barred by US law.

title: Pentagon Doesn't Have a Game Plan on Defense Spending, Says Mark Pocan
title_cn: 马克·波坎表示，五角大楼没有国防支出计划
summary: Democrat Representative from Wisconsin Mark Pocan said that he doesn't have faith in Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth and that the department doesn't have a game plan when it comes to defense spending, after requesting a record defense budget request of $1.5 trillion. Pocan said that the administration also does not have a plan when it came to the long term implications of war with Iran.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Will Not Make a Bad Deal With Iran, Bessent Says
title_cn: 贝森特称特朗普不会与伊朗达成糟糕的协议
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says President Donald Trump will not make a bad deal with Iran. Bessent says Iran must turn over its highly enriched uranium, they can't pursue a nuclear weapon and the Strait of Hormuz has to be fully open. He spoke at the White House.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Agree to 60-Day Truce Renewal Pending Trump Signoff
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意延长 60 天停战协议，等待特朗普签署
summary: The US and Iran have reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire by 60 days and launch further talks on Tehran’s nuclear program, a person with knowledge of the matter said, raising hopes the three-month conflict could be nearing a resolution.

title: Ex-Banco Master CEO Proposes New Plea Deal to Brazil Police
title_cn: Banco Master 前首席执行官向巴西警方提出新的认罪协议
summary: Former Banco Master Chief Executive Officer Daniel Vorcaro resumed talks with Brazil’s Federal Police over a potential plea deal, a week after investigators rejected his initial cooperation proposal.

title: Europe Weighs Less Reliance on US As Asia Doubles Down
title_cn: 亚洲加大力度，欧洲减少对美国的依赖
summary: Tension between the US and other NATO members is driving countries in Europe to consider collective defense that’s less reliant on America - yet the picture is much different in Asia.

title: Oil Pares Gain on News of Possible US-Iran Pact to Extend Truce
title_cn: 美伊可能达成延长休战协议的消息推动油价上涨
summary:
Oil pared gains on a report that the US and Iran have reached a preliminary agreement to extend the ceasefire between the two countries and launch negotiations on the Islamic Republic’s nuclear program.

The memorandum of understanding would extend the truce by 60 days and states that shipping through the vital Strait of Hormuz would be “unrestricted,” without any tolls paid to Iran, but the potential pact still requires President Trump’s approval, Axios reported. Trump wants several days to mull over the deal, according to the report.

An agreement to extend the truce would represent a diplomatic breakthrough and potentially bring the US and Iran closer to reopening normal maritime traffic through the strait, which usually carries around a fifth of the world’s oil and liquefied natural gas supply. For more, we speak with Mike McGlone, Senior Commodity Strategist for Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Florida’s Property-Tax Plan Risks Charging Fees for ‘Everything’
title_cn: 佛罗里达州的财产税计划面临着对“一切”收取费用的风险
summary: Palm Beach can count on its billionaires to keep picking up the tab for schools, firefighters and parks if Florida slashes property taxes. Many other local governments will have a tougher time making up the difference.

title: CFTC Moves to Undo Settlement That Had Gemini Pay $5 Million
title_cn: CFTC 撤销 Gemini 支付 500 万美元的和解协议
summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission and Gemini Trust Co., led by the billionaire Winklevoss brothers, want to dissolve a 2025 settlement that resulted in the cryptocurrency exchange agreeing to pay $5 million to end an agency lawsuit.

title: US Trade Chief Says German Streaming Quotas Violate Trade Deal
title_cn: 美国贸易主管称德国流媒体配额违反贸易协议
summary: President Donald Trump’s top trade official criticized a German draft law that would force American streaming services to invest in the country’s film sector, calling the measures discriminatory and a violation of the European Union’s trade deal with the US.

title: Mullin Defends Migrant Jail Where Senator Was Pepper-Sprayed
title_cn: 穆林为参议员被胡椒喷雾的移民监狱辩护
summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin defended conditions at a migrant detention center in New Jersey that was the scene of weekend protests in which two people were arrested and US Senator Andy Kim was hit with a cloud of pepper spray.

title: Capitol Hill Staff Won’t Rule Out Year-End Bipartisan Tax Deal
title_cn: 国会山工作人员不会排除年终两党税收协议
summary: Capitol Hill tax staff haven’t ruled out an end-of-year bipartisan tax package to adjust retirement fixes and international tax issues that have gone unaddressed—even as Republican lawmakers race against the clock to pass a “skinny” reconciliation package.

title: Former Businessman Becomes Latvian Premier After Drone Spat
title_cn: 无人机口角后前商人成为拉脱维亚总理
summary: Latvian Prime Minister Andris Kulbergs’s new government won a vote of confidence in parliament on Thursday following the collapse of the previous coalition in a row over drone incursions.

title: Wall Street Rushes to Mimic Crypto's Playbook on Capitol Hill
title_cn: 华尔街纷纷效仿国会山的加密货币剧本
summary: Banks are crafting a political spending strategy that resembles a structure the crypto industry has used.

title: Kenya, US Are in Ebola Complex Talks After Quarantine Report
title_cn: 检疫报告后肯尼亚和美国正在就埃博拉疫情进行谈判
summary: Kenya is in talks with the US on Ebola-related health cooperation after media reports that the Trump administration is planning to send Americans exposed to the virus to a quarantine facility in the East African nation being built by the US military.

title: Trump Files Fresh $10 Billion Suit Over WSJ’s Epstein Story
title_cn: 特朗普因《华尔街日报》报道爱泼斯坦的故事提起新的 100 亿美元诉讼
summary: President Donald Trump filed a new version of his $10 billion libel lawsuit against the Wall Street Journal and its parent company News Corp. over an article about his alleged close ties to Jeffrey Epstein, after an earlier version of the suit was tossed out by a judge.

title: Argentine Provinces Tap Global Markets That Sovereign Avoids
title_cn: 阿根廷各省开拓主权回避的全球市场
summary: Argentine provinces are tapping global bond markets at the fastest pace in nearly a decade, even as the federal government sticks to short-term debt in the local market amid investor fears over the 2027 elections.

title: NYC’s Mamdani Mimics Trump and Musk DOGE With COGE Plan
title_cn: 纽约市的 Mamdani 模仿特朗普和马斯克 DOGE 的 COGE 计划
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he’s forming a new Commission of Government Efficiency, or COGE, to improve the way City Hall spends public funds.

title: Ethiopia Says Bondholders Reject Latest Proposal of 12% Haircut
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚称债券持有人拒绝最新削减 12% 的提议
summary: Ethiopia’s finance ministry said restructuring talks with some bondholders fell through after they rebuffed its latest proposal for them to take a 12% loss, drawing out a default that dates back to December 2023.
